历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 16774 → 19667 → 19780 → 23596 → 27750, showing a continuous backward trend. In the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift was about 8000 places, with a 2025 baseline of about 27750. The enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 31 → 36 → 35 → 35 → 35 respectively. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 46, an expansion of about 31.4% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 77th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. In 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but in 2026 reputation data, Fuzhou University did not appear. Douyin popularity total ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, all being main enrollment directions for Fuzhou University's Physics Category. Civil Engineering shows differentiation and wait-and-see attitude, while Chemistry, Biology, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hubei Province is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 251,200, with a slightly expanded competition base. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, down from 437 points in 2024. Fuzhou University is located in Fuzhou City, Fujian Province, relatively far from Hubei Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the core favorable factor of a 2025 baseline ranking of 27750 and a significant expansion of about 31.4% in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (plan increased from 35 to 46), the ranking number should increase significantly (easier to enter). However, factors such as a slight increase in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province, continued high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering attracting more high-scoring candidates, and the stable 211 level of the university create some upward resistance. After weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 32785, with a range of 32285–33285.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 32285–33285, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 32285), one can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 33285), one should mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors. Fujian-Taiwan cooperation programs (Electronic Information Engineering, Logistics Management) typically have lower rankings than regular majors and can be used as safety choices.
